creator: alo@louko.com
text:
I am experiencing this with both 7.1-RELEASE and 8.0-CURRENT-200812. The
motherboard is Asus M2A-VM-HDMI.

If there is as much as USB memory stick in the USB interface, system panics.

This is a show stopper to my plan to boot from USB stick and have all
the rest in ZFS pool (part SATA, part FF or USB).

And this is on old bug. Has anyone has even an idea where to look and
what kind of work-around might be possible?
